code: import axios from"axios";const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api";const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE});export const getApplications=status=>api.get("/applications",{params:status?{status}:{}}).then(r=>r.data);export const createApplication=payload=>api.post("/applications",payload).then(r=>r.data);export const updateApplication=(id,payload)=>api.put("/applications/".concat(id),payload).then(r=>r.data);export const deleteApplication=id=>api.delete("/applications/".concat(id)).then(r=>r.data);export const getStats=()=>api.get("/stats").then(r=>r.data);export default api;
